design_intent.player_fantasy: Experience Hollow Knight through its core metroidvania loop.

gdd_outline.combat_notes: Nail strikes and spells consume soul; boss patterns demand dodge timing and charm loadout swaps before attempts.
constraints: Geo lost on death until recovered at shade
Ability gates block progression until tools are found
gdd_outline.core_loop: Explore interconnected zones, fight enemies and bosses for geo and abilities, rest at benches to heal and save, backtrack with new movement tools to reach secrets and story gates.
gdd_outline.economy_notes: Geo funds maps, keys, and charms at vendors; shade recovery creates risk on death spending.
gdd_outline.overview: Hollow Knight is a metroidvania where the Knight explores the fallen kingdom of Hallownest, gaining traversal abilities that reopen prior areas and facing precise melee bosses at benches between routes.
player_goals: Defeat major bosses gating new zones
Map Hallownest and resolve the infection narrative
gdd_outline.progression_notes: Mask shards and vessel fragments extend health and soul; charms and nail upgrades modify combat at benches.

mechanics.expression: Mothwing Cloak dash, Crystal Heart super dash, and Monarch Wings double jump reopen prior areas.
mechanics.map_notes: Mothwing Cloak dash, Crystal Heart super dash, and Monarch Wings double jump reopen prior areas.

mechanics.expression: Acid pools, high ledges, and dark zones require specific abilities or items to pass.
mechanics.map_notes: Acid pools, high ledges, and dark zones require specific abilities or items to pass.

mechanics.expression: Nail sword strikes, nail arts, and directional slashes define all offensive combat.
mechanics.map_notes: Nail sword strikes, nail arts, and directional slashes define all offensive combat.

mechanics.expression: Benches save progress, refill health and soul, and serve as respawn points on death.
mechanics.map_notes: Benches save progress, refill health and soul, and serve as respawn points on death.

mechanics.expression: Major bosses like False Knight and Hornet gate story and ability progression.
mechanics.map_notes: Major bosses like False Knight and Hornet gate story and ability progression.

mechanics.expression: Mask shards extend HP; damage depletes masks until death.
mechanics.map_notes: Mask shards extend HP; damage depletes masks until death.

mechanics.expression: Spikes, acid, saw blades, and environmental damage zones throughout Hallownest.
mechanics.map_notes: Spikes, acid, saw blades, and environmental damage zones throughout Hallownest.

mechanics.map_notes: Abilities, nail upgrades, and charm notches found through exploration and bosses.

mechanics.map_notes: Essence collection unlocks ability upgrades at specific NPCs.

mechanics.expression: Geo drops from enemies and breakable objects fund purchases.
mechanics.map_notes: Geo drops from enemies and breakable objects fund purchases.

mechanics.map_notes: Bosses like the Mantis Lords and Radiance shift attack patterns across phases.

mechanics.map_notes: Hidden paths, breakable walls, and optional boss arenas reward thorough exploration.

mechanics.map_notes: All major bosses follow learnable telegraphed attack cycles.

mechanics.map_notes: Tight platforming sections require precise jump and dash timing.

narrative.core_loop: Explore Hallownest, fight enemies with nail melee and spells, collect geo currency, rest at benches to save and heal, purchase upgrades and charms, acquire movement abilities to reach gated areas, and defeat bosses to progress the story.
narrative.description: A nameless knight explores the fallen kingdom of Hallownest, battling infected creatures and uncovering lore. Players acquire nail upgrades, spells, and movement abilities to traverse a vast interconnected map, rest at benches, and confront the source of the infection.

ui_menus.map_notes: Opens charm, inventory, map, and options.
Sly, Iselda, and other geo vendors.

variable_relationships.notes: Benches heal health without spending geo.
Shops sell charms and tools for geo.

variables.expression: Bench heals to full; death drops geo at shade.
variables.map_notes: Mask shards extend lifeblood masks to 4–9.

variables.expression: Lost on death at shade; recovered by defeating shade.
variables.map_notes: Primary currency for vendors and shade recovery.

variables.expression: Spent at shade and some vendors.
variables.map_notes: Soul currency for shade gate and vendors.

variables.expression: Vengeful Spirit, Desolate Dive, Howling Wraiths, Descending Dark.
variables.map_notes: Focus spells bound to attack buttons.
